experiment.task: ER status binary MLP baseline (UNI v1)

evidence: metrics.json: n_train=707, n_val=152 (consistent across ER/PR/PAM50 runs).
split_policy_v0 is site-disjoint (707/152/151) — good structural signal.
data_leakage.notes: Patient-level disjointness not yet verified against predictions index + split file on the reviewer machine. jamie to confirm predictions patient IDs are disjoint from train.

evidence: trivial_baselines.json: random AUC=0.5262, majority AUC=0.5000, mean_embed AUC=0.8162.
MLP ER AUC=0.8209 vs strongest trivial baseline mean_embed=0.8162 -> delta = +0.0047 (n_val=152), within noise.
Required baselines are random / subtype-only / pixel-mean; actual set = random / majority / mean_embed -> subtype-only and pixel-mean are MISSING (mean_embed is embedding-mean, not pixel-mean).
baseline_comparison.notes: Does NOT pass. The MLP barely exceeds the embedding-mean baseline and the CLAUDE.md-required subtype-only baseline (ER<->PAM50 correlation concern) is absent. To reach pass: add subtype-only + pixel-mean baselines and a DeLong/bootstrap significance test for MLP vs mean_embed; if the gap is not significant, report honestly that UNI embedding is the signal and the MLP adds little.

counterfactual_check.notes: MLP baseline stage — no feature-attribution claim. Counterfactual/attention ablation is deferred to the MIL stage (BIOP02-56).

cross_dataset_check.notes: ER MLP is TCGA-only by design at Sprint 1. External (CPTAC) evaluation is BIOP02-53/57; sub-check owner = jhans.

evidence: Morphology -> ER status is biologically plausible (ER status has known histologic correlates in BRCA).
biological_plausibility.notes: Plausible, but the assigned #5 sub-reviewer (sjpark) is the experiment owner -> self-review prohibited. Reassign #5 to a non-owner (jhans). No therapeutic hypothesis may be inferred from this baseline.

evidence: metrics.json and config.yaml contain no DRP / personalized-therapy / patient-specific-optimal-treatment wording.
drp_framing.notes: Recheck any companion report text before final pass.

evidence: metrics.json: critic_status=pending (owner did not self-set pass).
claim_level.notes: Do not escalate claim_level without written exception.

summary: Verified Critic review of the ER-status UNI v1 MLP (JIRA BIOP02-50 comment 10857). Reported numbers checked against committed metrics.json/trivial_baselines.json (commit faed11e). Blocker is Critic #2: the MLP (AUC 0.8209) exceeds the strongest trivial baseline mean_embed (0.8162) by only +0.0047 on n_val=152, and the required subtype-only and pixel-mean baselines are missing. Overall critic_status = caution (NOT pass). Not for #biop02-experiments until #2 is resolved.
required_followups: Add subtype-only baseline (PAM50 -> ER) and a pixel-mean baseline; report both.
Add DeLong (or bootstrap 95% CI) significance test for MLP AUC vs mean_embed AUC.
Reassign biological_plausibility (#5) sub-check to a non-owner (jhans), not sjpark.
Verify patient-level split disjointness against predictions index (jamie).
Formal peer review by the designated reviewer for sjpark modeling results = kkkim (Owner != Reviewer).
Re-evaluate critic_status to pass only after baseline_comparison reaches pass.
